en: Great. And why do different people have different accents?
ko: 좋아. 그런데 왜 사람마다 억양이 다를까?

en: Like, I'm from New Jersey, you're from what part of London are you from? Manchester.
ko: 나는 뉴저지 출신이고, 너는 런던의 어느 지역 출신이야? 맨체스터.

en: Right, Manchester. So that's north, north, north England, right?
ko: 맞아, 맨체스터. 그러니까 북쪽, 북쪽, 북쪽 잉글랜드지, 맞지?

en: That's more than one word. Too many words? Sorry.
ko: 그건 한 단어보다 많아. 너무 많은 단어야? 미안.

en: Northwest is kind of a compound word, so it's one word.
No, you said north and then I added the west.
ko: 아니, 너는 북쪽이라고 했고 내가 서쪽을 추가한 거야.

en: Are you talking about Kanye's baby? No.
They have two babies. One is named north and one is named west, right?
ko: 그들은 두 아기가 있어. 하나는 북쪽, 하나는 서쪽이라고, 맞지?

en: Isn't north and west the same person?
Great question, actually. I have no idea.
ko: 좋은 질문이야, 사실 나도 잘 몰라.

en: Okay, so the movie is called Dunkirk, right? Yes.
Which one do you think you're better at, acting or singing or maybe, I mean, dancing even?
ko: 너는 연기, 노래, 아니면 춤 중에 어떤 게 더 잘한다고 생각해?

en: What the fuck is that? Is this an actual airport? Yeah. Oh.
ko: 그게 뭐야? 이게 실제 공항이야? 응. 오.
